plans.purpose: Prove scroll-linked product storytelling without external runtime code.
plans.artifactScope: Landing hero and proof sections only.
plans.rejectedNativeAlternative: Static sections alone would not prove cause-effect between scroll and product state.
plans.licenseSecurity: Browser APIs only; no dependency or remote runtime.
plans.bundlePerformance: No added bundle; compositor-only transform and opacity animation.
plans.accessibilityFallback: Static section order, visible headings, and no content hidden behind animation.
plans.reducedMotionFallback: Disable scroll-linked movement and show final resting composition.

plans.purpose: Prove an interactive operational graph that would be misleading as static cards.
plans.artifactScope: Prototype graph canvas plus adjacent semantic inspector.
plans.rejectedNativeAlternative: SVG became unreadable at the target node count and did not show depth or selection state clearly.
plans.licenseSecurity: Dependency is locked, reviewed, and bundled locally; no CDN runtime.
plans.bundlePerformance: Lazy-load graph scene after primary content; static fallback for low-capability devices.
plans.accessibilityFallback: Adjacent DOM table exposes every node, edge, selection state, and keyboard action.
plans.reducedMotionFallback: Disable camera drift and particles; keep static graph pose.

plans.purpose: Document a rendered product video because local video tooling is unavailable.
plans.artifactScope: Storyboard frames and implementation notes; no prototype runtime dependency.
plans.rejectedNativeAlternative: CSS animation could not represent the requested exported video deliverable.
plans.licenseSecurity: No dependency in prototype; production owner must review media pipeline.
plans.bundlePerformance: Static poster in prototype; production WebM/MP4 budget documented for handoff.
plans.accessibilityFallback: Poster image, transcript, and non-autoplay policy.
plans.reducedMotionFallback: Poster-only by default for reduced motion.
